workOrder.summary: Turn the student home primary action and next-steps list into real in-page actions.
workOrder.selectionReason: The student dashboard already returned requirement-backed next steps, scoped submission ids, and an in-page requirement detail panel, but the student home still rendered that guidance as static text.

repoGroundedFindings: functions/api/student/dashboard.ts already builds nextSteps from required requirements plus latest submission state.
workspace.js rendered Do this next and What to Work On Next as static text with no path back to the matching requirement.
workspace.js already had student-safe requirement detail disclosure, evidence focus behavior, and submit actions that could be reused.
changes: Added requirementId, submissionId, submissionStatus, and evidenceCount to student dashboard next-step rows.
Rendered Open requirement plus existing Add evidence / Send revision / Send for review actions from the student home primary action card and next-steps rows.
Focused the existing in-page requirement detail after opening it from a student-home quick action.
Added focused route and workspace coverage for the enriched next-step payload and open-detail behavior.
nextRecommended: Run hosted section-level permission proof when hosted fake-account proof and audit-event writes are allowed; otherwise inspect student submission rows for a second View timeline shortcut into the existing student-safe feedback history.
